step1.title: Share content
step1.desc: Paste a link, article text, or any claim you want to verify

step2.title: We analyze
step2.desc: Our AI cross-references with trusted news sources and fact-checkers

step3.title: Get the truth
step3.desc: See a clear verdict with sources you can check yourself

verification.title: Fact-check
verification.description: Check if news is true or false
verification.placeholder: Enter news headline or content to verify...

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track your verification history and stats

about.heroTitle: See the story from every side
about.heroDesc: Facets groups coverage across outlets and helps you fact-check claims before you share.
about.storyP1: Headlines travel faster than context. Facets shows how left, center, and right publishers cover the same event, then lets you verify a claim with AI and cited sources.
about.storyP2: Our platform combines a multi-source coverage feed with AI verification against search and trusted-style sources. Check perspective on the feed, then verify claims on the home page. No expertise required.

trustworthy.title: Trustworthy verification
trustworthy.desc: We check against multiple reliable sources, not just one.

fast.title: Fast results
fast.desc: Get answers in seconds, not hours of research.

global.title: Global coverage
global.desc: We verify news from sources around the world.

privacy.title: Privacy first
privacy.desc: Your searches are yours. We don't sell your data.

howItWorks.heroDesc: See how we help you separate fact from fiction in just a few steps.

smartUnderstanding.title: Smart understanding
smartUnderstanding.desc: Our AI understands context and nuance, not just keywords

trustedSources.title: Trusted sources
trustedSources.desc: We only use verified, reputable sources for verification

realTime.title: Real-time analysis
realTime.desc: Get results in seconds, not hours of manual research

howItWorks.ctaDesc: Start verifying in seconds. No signup required.
